a.xlink:title: High-level facade for entity manipulation in the ECS.
Dispatcher for routing timer control commands to the appropriate handler.
Abstract handler interface for timer control commands.
Manager for game timers and timer command handling.
A game timer that tracks elapsed time and supports state transitions.
Central registry for managing game entities.
Type-safe dispatcher template for WorldCommand handling.
Central manager for entity lifecycle and component storage.
Versioned handle for referencing entities in an EntityPool.
Context struct passed to components during per-frame updates.
Global registry mapping ComponentTypeId to ComponentOps.
Compile-time type identifier for component types.
Type alias for entity version numbers used in handle validation.
Type alias for entity identifiers within an EntityPool.
Type definitions for collision layer identifiers.
Sentinel value for invalid sparse array indices.
Tag component indicating an active entity.
Tag component indicating an inactive entity.
Component for observing score pool changes as high score.
Component for observing score pool changes.
Component that associates an entity with a score pool.
Template component for storing score values on entities.
